test-code.description: When using JUnit Jupiter, using a JUnit Jupiter annotation is OK
When using JUnit4, using a JUnit Jupiter annotation is NOT OK
When using TestNG, using a TestNG annotation is NOT OK
When using Jupiter, using a JUnit4 annotation is NOT OK
When using JUnit4, using a JUnit4 annotation is OK
When using TestNG, using a JUnit4 annotation is NOT OK
When using Jupiter, using a TestNG annotation is NOT OK
When using JUnit4, using a TestNG annotation is NOT OK
When using TestNG, using a TestNG annotation is OK

expected-messages.message: The annotation org.junit.Test is from JUnit 4, your codebase is using JUnit Jupiter.
The annotation org.junit.Test is from JUnit 4, your codebase is using JUnit Jupiter, TestNG.
